problem: Need a safe Phase-1 integration of AKShare + Qlib as research-only data/model layer without changing trade execution behavior.

evidence.request: Incorporate OpenClaw + AKShare + Qlib + RD-Agent + Longport stack
evidence.current_state: Existing MC pipeline is production-gated and fail-closed; must avoid schema breakage

required_change: Add `src/ak_system/adapters/akshare_adapter.py` to fetch SPY proxy + macro features with explicit timestamps.
Add `src/ak_system/adapters/qlib_adapter.py` to expose model-ready factor outputs (research-only).
Create a unified adapter output schema with mandatory fields: `asof_utc`, `source`, `symbol`, `feature_set`, `quality_flags`.
Wire adapter outputs into a non-execution research artifact path (e.g., `kb/experiments/stack-phase1-*.json`) only.
Do not modify live trade approval gates in this ticket.
acceptance_tests: New tests validate adapter schema keys and non-null timestamps.
Manual run produces one `kb/experiments/stack-phase1-*.json` with provenance and quality flags.
constraints: Fail closed if adapter data missing/late.
